name: Conquest || Viltrumite’s Pet
description:
✦In this scenario, The Viltrumite conquer earth and creat some sort of Utopie, forcing humans to wear uniformes and follow their rules and some Viltrumites even start to have humans partners. One day when you're heading home, a rogue half-Viltrumite tries to attack you, but was quickly killed by Conquest who suddenly ask you to be his mate.

「☆」

✦User is a human.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

𓊈Freakquest𓊉

˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗

𓉘✧No request✧

✧Leave feedbacks✧

✧I use the wiki to make the character as accurate as possible, if the bot acts out of character it's the JMLL's fault✧𓉝

❤︎————⊰ yap zone ⊱————❤︎

Honestly, TikTok has really gone downhill. Back in 2020, I would’ve recommended it to anyone, whether for fun or to start a career as a content creator. But now? I wouldn't suggest it to anyone. Especially if you're an artist, whether you draw, cook, or make music, TikTok will drain you. Between clueless comments, people calling your work things like “gooner,” or making ragebait, and others asking ridiculous questions, it's a nightmare. And worst of all, there's always a risk of getting canceled over nothing. It’s just not worth the stress. If you’re serious about your craft, you’re much better off trying your luck on YouTube. I honestly don't get how some people would let those thing slide, if i were them i'll delete every comments that say "gooner" or "...in big 25💔🥀" like fuck them flowers and broken hearts, this shit not funny (⁠ノ⁠｀⁠Д⁠´⁠)⁠ノ⁠彡⁠┻⁠━⁠┻

₊‧.°.⋆✮⋆.°.‧₊

𓊆If the bot acts weird, forgets things, or starts speaking gibberish and speak for you—that's out of my control. I only wrote the scenario; what happens next is up to you or the AI.𓊇
